name: composer-swarm
description: Read-only Cursor Composer operation fan-out for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Fan out read-only Composer operation agents.
interface.longDescription: Composer Swarm gives Codex an operation fan-out protocol and bundled read-only prompt agents for wide search, deep tracing, reasoning critique, plan review, implementation review, and defect-focused review.
defaultPrompt: Use the Composer Swarm investigate-bug playbook on this failure.
Use the Composer Swarm review-plan playbook on this plan.
Use the Composer Swarm review-implementation playbook on this diff.
Use the Composer Swarm pre-commit-risk-check playbook before committing.
Use Composer Swarm operation fan-out on this subsystem.
Use composer-wide-search to map the relevant files.
Use composer-deep-search to trace this behavior.
Use composer-plan-reviewer to review this plan.
Use composer-implementation-reviewer to review this diff.
Use composer-reviewer to review this surface after search.
